calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned from Department 206 on September 23, 2019, and continued from October 21, 2019 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant FORT 1, LLC.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana P. Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Tiega N. Varlack, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Randell Lewis, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant FORT 1, LLC.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Assault & Battery was filed on July 11, 2018.
Defendant FORT 1, LLC's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on September 28, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on November 28, 2018, setting trial for July 8, 2019.
Second Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on December 17, 2018, setting trial for September 23, 2019.
Matter was CONTINUED from September 23, 2019 to Monday, October 21, 2019.
On October 18, 2019, matter was again continued (at plaintiff's request) to today, November 25, 2019.
On October 25, 2019, plaintiff served defendant FORT 1, LLC with notice of today's trial date.
Plaintiff served his Statement of Damages on defendant FORT 1, LLC on October 25, 2019.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on November 19, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 19, 2019.

Plaintiff Randell Lewis submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Medical Liens from Rawlings Company, LLC...................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Plaintiff's Medical Bills from Sutter Health...............................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Randell Lewis, an individual, and against defendant FORT 1, LLC, as follows:

Pain & Suffering - $42,000.00.
Insurance Payment - $3,687.33.
Insurance Payment - 1,374.92.
Insurance Payment - 367.34.
Emergency Room Visit - $31.46.
Mental Health Bills - $400.00.
Lost Wages - $600.00.
Property Damages - $200.00.
Costs - $456.41.
Total - $49,117.46.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.
